{{Quote|Morp droids! Ventress' doing! They electrocute anything they touch!|[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Republic 69">[[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]]</ref>}}
'''Morp droids''' were a series of small [[Seeker (droid)/Legends|seeker droid]] that were developed by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. They were named after the [[morp]] species of [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].

Morp droids resembled six legged beetles and they were equipped with a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] which allowed them navigate their environment. What made the droids dangerous was the powerful electrical charges they could unleash on living flesh. A problem with the droids' power source caused an electrical blue aura to form around them when they were searching for their targets. The aura made them much easier to locate.

Asajj Ventress attempted to assassinate [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] with Morp droids aboard the ''[[Titavian IV]]''.
